# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud storage security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the storage account for application logs and backups. Must be globally unique, 3-24 characters, lowercase letters and numbers only."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure region for the storage account."
      }
    },
    "allowedSubnetResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Optional: Resource ID of a VNet subnet to allow access from. If empty, network rules default to deny with no VNet exceptions."
      }
    },
    "allowedIpAddress": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Optional: A single IP address or CIDR range to allow access from. If empty, no IP exceptions are added."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageAccountName": "[toLower(parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
    "logsContainerName": "application-logs",
    "backupsContainerName": "backups",
    "networkRulesVirtualNetworkRules": "[if(empty(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceId')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('id', parameters('allowedSubnetResourceId'), 'action', 'Allow')))]",
    "networkRulesIpRules": "[if(empty(parameters('allowedIpAddress')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('value', parameters('allowedIpAddress'), 'action', 'Allow')))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[variables('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_GRS"
      },
      "properties": {
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "allowSharedKeyAccess": false,
        "allowCrossTenantReplication": false,
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Disabled",
        "defaultToOAuthAuthentication": true,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Deny",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "virtualNetworkRules": "[variables('networkRulesVirtualNetworkRules')]",
          "ipRules": "[variables('networkRulesIpRules')]"
        },
        "encryption": {
          "services": {
            "blob": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            }
          },
          "keySource": "Microsoft.Storage",
          "requireInfrastructureEncryption": true
        }
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
          "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
          "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "deleteRetentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 30
            },
            "containerDeleteRetentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 30
            },
            "isVersioningEnabled": true
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default/', variables('logsContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', variables('storageAccountName'), 'default')]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None",
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "application-logs",
          "managedBy": "logging-infrastructure"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default/', variables('backupsContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', variables('storageAccountName'), 'default')]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None",
        "immutableStorageWithVersioning": {
          "enabled": true
        },
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "backups",
          "managedBy": "logging-infrastructure"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/providers/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/storageAccountDiagnostics')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "metrics": [
          {
            "category": "Transaction",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/providers/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/default/Microsoft.Insights/blobDiagnostics')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', variables('storageAccountName'), 'default')]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "logs": [
          {
            "category": "StorageRead",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          },
          {
            "category": "StorageWrite",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          },
          {
            "category": "StorageDelete",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageAccountId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('storageAccountName')]"
    },
    "blobEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.blob]"
    },
    "logsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('logsContainerName')]"
    },
    "backupsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('backupsContainerName')]"
    }
  }
}
